dashboard.label: Audit Trail
dashboard.description: Full history of every whitelist change — who, what, when, and the exact rows added or removed

search.query: index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit | dedup analyst | sort analyst | table analyst
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit | dedup detection_rule | sort detection_rule | table detection_rule

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | stats sum(added_row_count) as r_added sum(removed_row_count) as r_removed sum(edited_row_count) as r_edited sum(auto_removed_count) as r_auto | eval total_changes=coalesce(r_added,0)+coalesce(r_removed,0)+coalesce(r_edited,0)+coalesce(r_auto,0) | table total_changes
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="added" | stats sum(added_row_count) as total_rows_added

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="removed" OR action="removed_multiple" OR action="auto_removed" | stats sum(removed_row_count) as total_rows_removed
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="edited" | stats sum(edited_row_count) as total_rows_edited

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | stats values(value{}) as value values(*) as * by action csv_file analyst timestamp | sort -timestamp | eval timestamp=strftime(timestamp, "%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S GMT%:::z") | eval row_change_count=case(action=="removed_multiple", removed_row_count, action=="removed", removed_row_count, action=="auto_removed", removed_row_count, action=="edited", edited_row_count, action=="added", added_row_count), action_temp=case(action=="removed_multiple", "removed", action=="removed", "removed", action=="auto_removed", "auto_removed", action=="edited", "edited", action=="added", "added") | eval summary="User "+analyst+" "+action_temp+" "+row_change_count+" row(s) from "+csv_file+" (detection rule - "+detection_rule+") at "+timestamp | table timestamp action analyst csv_file detection_rule remove_reason row_change_count value summary
| wlexpiringsoon | where "$rule_filter$"="*" OR detection_rule="$rule_filter$" | table detection_rule csv_file Expires value
